version_name: Knowledge Base Quality Review & Scientific Validation
features: 68 element misclassifications fixed across 5 systematic patterns
213 connection attributes scientifically validated against published literature
1,120 total connections (up from 622) — zero orphan elements
Zero disconnected subgraphs across all 30 contexts
16 governance/SE reclassifications in country governance database
2 new regional conventions: SPREP/Noumea (Pacific) and Abidjan (West Africa)
Governance gaps filled for 4 groups (non_eu_european, latin_american, african_coastal, asia_pacific)
86 new keyword stems and 7 context boosts in classification database
25 new R connection KB patterns (feedback loops, offshore wind, Arctic, invasive species)
Confidence distribution recalibrated to evidence-based bell curve
KB validation script (scripts/validate_kb.py) for automated integrity checks

critical.issue: 52 connections had incorrect polarity (wrong direction of effect)
critical.impact: Incorrect causal relationships shown to users (e.g., warming marked positive for Posidonia, hurricanes positive for coral)
critical.resolution: All polarities reviewed against HELCOM, ICES, UNEP-MAP, GCRMN, IPCC AR6, AMAP literature

critical.impact: Degraded suggestion quality — activities classified as drivers, states as pressures, etc.
critical.resolution: Reclassified per DAPSI(W)R(M) framework definitions from Elliott et al.

improvements.issue: 25-51% orphan elements per context (listed but unconnected)
improvements.resolution: Added connections for all orphans + bridge connections for subgraphs → 0% orphan rate
Recalibrated to bell curve: 3.1% L1, 7.8% L2, 43.8% L3, 23.6% L4, 21.7% L5

improvements.issue: Keyword classification matched only 52-66% of KB element names
improvements.resolution: Added ~86 keyword stems and 7 context boosts

migration_notes: No breaking changes — fully backward-compatible with v1.9.x data
Knowledge database version bumped to 2.0 (major quality improvements)
All existing project data loads without modification
Connection count increased from 622 to 1120 — new connections have default confidence=3
developer_notes: Run scripts/validate_kb.py to validate KB integrity after any KB changes
Reversibility must be exactly: reversible, partially_reversible, or irreversible
Temporal lag must be: immediate, short-term, medium-term, or long-term
All elements in every context must appear in at least one connection
R connection KB patterns now cover 10 flow types including W->D, W->R, R->D feedback
deployment_notes: KB validation runs automatically — no app code changes
Translation cache regenerates on first startup
